*** 1 INJ *** CONFIRMED EF-0 TORNADO CROSSED INTERSTATE 10 AT MILE MARKER 168. AN 18-WHEELER WAS TOSSED OFF THE HIGHWAY WITH MINOR INJURIES TO THE DRIVER. A MULTI-VEHICLE CRASH WAS ALSO REPORTED WITH NO INJURIES. NUMEROUS TREES WERE DOWN IN THE AREA WITH DEBRIS ON EAST- AND WEST-BOUND LANES. IN HARDAWAY...THREE MILES NORTHEAST OF THE INTERSTATE...NUMEROUS TREES WERE SNAPPED OR UPROOTED WITH DAMGE TO TWO MOBILE HOMES.

POSSIBLE TORNADO LIKELY CROSSED INTERSTATE 10 AT MILE MARKER 168. MULTI-VEHICLE CRASH REPORTED WITH NO INJURIES. NUMEROUS TREES DOWN IN THE AREA WITH DEBRIS ON EAST AND WEST BOUND LANES OF THE INTERSTATE.

EF-1 TORNADO CONFIRMED IN MT PLEASANT. SEVERAL HOMES WERE SIGNIFICANTLY DAMAGED WITH LARGE OAK TREES UPROOTED. NUMEROUS TREES DOWNED IN THE AREA. A FEW BARNS WERE DAMAGED. THE STRONGEST WINDS WITH THE TORNADO WERE ESTIMATED AT 110 MPH WITH A MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH OF 150 YARDS.
POSSIBLE TORNADO REPORTED IN MT PLEASANT. SEVERAL HOMES DAMAGED. NUMEROUS TREES DOWNED IN THE AREA. A FEW BARNS WERE DAMAGED.

*** 1 INJ *** EF-1 TORNADO CONFIRMED IN THIS AREA. TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AGAIN ALONG PINE FOREST ROAD EAST OF GA-111. ABOUT 1 MILE UP PINE FOREST ROAD...A MOBILE HOME WAS DESTROYED WITH THE FREE STANDING CARPORT TOSSED 200 YARDS INTO THE NEARBY FOREST. THE OCCUPANT OF THE MOBILE HOME WAS INJURED WHEN THE HOME ROLLED OVER. THE ROOF AND EXTERIOR WALLS WERE DESTROYED. THE FRAME REMAINS ATTACHED TO THE UNDERCARRIAGE OF THE MOBILE HOME. MAXIMUM WINDS WERE ESTIMATED AT 110 MPH WITH A PATH WIDTH OF 75 YARDS.
*** 1 INJ *** MOBILE HOME TIPPED OVER. SEVERAL TREES AND POWERLINES DOWN. ONE INJURED WHEN MOBILE HOME WAS NEARLY DESTROYED ON PINE FOREST ROAD.

NWS SURVEY TEAM ESTIMATES EF-0 DAMAGE FROM A WATER SPOUT THAT MOVED ASHORE AS A TORNADO AND CREATED A DAMAGE PATH THAT EXTENDED ABOUT A HALF MILE INLAND. THE DAMAGE OCCURRED ON DEKLE BEACH ROAD...MEXICO ROAD AND PALMETTO ROAD. ADDITIONAL DETAILS TO FOLLOW.
